sales.description:
ROMAN REPUBLIC. Anonymous. AR Quinarius (2.30 gms), Rome Mint, ca. 211-208 B.C. NGC Ch AU★, Strike: 5/5 Surface: 5/5.
To view all items from the John P. Burnham Collection, click  here.
Cr-44/6; Syd-141. Obverse: Helmeted head of Roma right; V (mark of value) behind; Reverse: The Dioscuri, each holding spear, on horses rearing right; ROMA in relief within tablet in exergue. A stunning Quinarius, delivering impressive strike quality that is well centered on the flan of good metal. Charmingly to...
